# Allowed Draft Fields

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/draftfields -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to adapter-draft-fields.md](../adapter-draft-fields.md)

Executable SSOT: [`draft-field-surface.riido.json`](draft-field-surface.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `draft-fields-evidence`.

## Fields

| Field | Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Type` | `implemented` | normalized IR event type selected by providerEventDraft |
| `Payload` | `implemented` | provider-observed event data that is safe to forward as a draft payload |
| `ProviderSessionID` | `implemented` | provider-native session identifier observed from EventSessionIdentified |
| `RawType` | `source_only` | provider-specific raw event type before adapter translation |
| `Raw` | `source_only` | raw provider payload/bytes may exist before translation but is not emitted by providerEventDraft |
| `ObservedAt` | `source_only` | run-scope observation time carried by agentbridge.Event; workspace draft emission does not currently persist it |
| `Unknown` | `reserved` | reserved vocabulary for preserving unknown provider fields without granting authority |
| `ProviderTurnID` | `reserved` | reserved vocabulary for provider-native turn identifiers when a provider exposes one |

## Status Meaning

- `implemented`: emitted by current draft construction code.
- `source_only`: present before draft construction but not currently emitted.
- `reserved`: vocabulary allowed for future use but not claimed as emitted.
